title: IDI/I.D.I.O.T.

Antivirus}} {{Background|file=Void.png}} {{Audio|file=Screen In Faces.mp3|volume=0.5|=yes}}
V.C.U. Transmission Log - August 27, 2024 {{Underline|FFFFFF}} ''"Is something wrong, Thatcher?"''
'''"No- well, yeah. Did you see the news?"'''
''"What news?"''
'''"The recent IDI sighting in Base Alpha."'''
''"Oh... yeah. What about it?"''
'''"What do you mean 'what about it?' That thing is class 5 in intelligence! If it hacked into Base Alpha, it more than likely knows about us."'''
''"Right. So what do you suggest we do? I can see why even then, we'd likely have to create some sort of counter to IDI."''
'''"Exactly."'''
''"...Huh? You mean- ah. I get it now. An antivirus, right?"''
'''"Precisely. We can't risk IDI, or any type of malware in fact, compromising one of our devices. The data we hold is very important. So I think our next project could be dedicated to creating something that can protect us from any virus attacks."
''"All of this because [[I.R.I.S.|someone's]] little weapon got out of hand..."''
'''"Yep. We should get to work. We can't waste time on this when we also have to solve out The Void."'''
''"Oh, I can tell you, right now, this is the smallest of our problems."
'''I.D.I.O.T Antivirus'''
[[File:IDIOTmalwarelight.gif|center|250px|The notification display that appears when the I.D.I.O.T. failsafe is activated.]]
[[File:IDIOTmalwaredark.gif|center|250px|The notification display that appears when the I.D.I.O.T. malware is activated.]]
'''The notification display that appears when the I.D.I.O.T. malware is activated.''' Overview{{Underline|FFFFFF}} The '''IDI Defense, Inspection and Observation Tool''' (''I.D.I.O.T.'') is an antivirus created by the [[V.C.U.]] designed to specifically target IDI. The antivirus was developed in late 2024 to counter the increased sightings of IDI that emerged during that time period. The I.D.I.O.T. antivirus can be adjusted by the organization using it to match its specific security concerns or proper communication mediums. The antivirus works by automatically resetting the device's file data upon detecting any anomalous activity from an external source via heuristics, such as USBs or anomalies. Upon encountering a fatal error or a system breach, it will by default perform a factory reset and force the device into shutdown for 12 hours, effectively blocking out IDI. The device can be turned on manually if it is optimized to allow it. Additionally, it has been programmed to recognize IDI's patterns. Upon activation, it will notify the security field according to how it has been adjusted by the organization in possession of the device and warn the owner of the device of possible entity presence. Flaws{{Underline|FFFFFF}} The '''I.D.I.O.T. Antivirus''' is not completely foolproof. If the device with the IDIOT antivirus is outdated, old, or broken, IDI can still manifest within it. Additionally, it is important to note that if IDI is manifested physically, the IDIOT antivirus is ineffective, and it is possible for IDI to memorize the patterns of the antivirus due to its intelligence. As a result, it is recommended to not completely rely on the '''I.D.I.O.T. Antivirus''' to take safety measures against IDI. If the antivirus is triggered, it is best recommended to turn off the device manually if its use is currently unnecessary and follow the basic survival means documented by [[The Database]]. When in levels filled with devices or technology, make sure that all devices are in good condition and up-to-date to make the best use of the antivirus.

'''And most importantly...'''
{{Collapse|num=2|initial=
'''''Don't let your guard down.'''''
|final='''''
...It is not worth the risk.'''''
